PARAM.description: when computing the loess fit at a particular point, this fraction of source points closest to the current point is taken into account for computing a least-squares regression. A sensible value is usually 0.25 to 0.5, the default value is @link #DEFAULT_BANDWIDTH.
PARAM.name: bandwidth
PARAM.content: when computing the loess fit at a particular point, this fraction of source points closest to the current point is taken into account for computing a least-squares regression. A sensible value is usually 0.25 to 0.5, the default value is @link #DEFAULT_BANDWIDTH.

PARAM.description: This many robustness iterations are done. A sensible value is usually 0 (just the initial fit without any robustness iterations) to 4, the default value is @link #DEFAULT_ROBUSTNESS_ITERS.
PARAM.name: robustnessIters
PARAM.content: This many robustness iterations are done. A sensible value is usually 0 (just the initial fit without any robustness iterations) to 4, the default value is @link #DEFAULT_ROBUSTNESS_ITERS.

PARAM.description: bandwidth when computing the loess fit at a particular point, this fraction of source points closest to the current point is taken into account for computing a least-squares regression. A sensible value is usually 0.25 to 0.5, the default value is @link #DEFAULT_BANDWIDTH.
PARAM.name: bandwidth

PARAM.description: This many robustness iterations are done. A sensible value is usually 0 (just the initial fit without any robustness iterations) to 4, the default value is @link #DEFAULT_ROBUSTNESS_ITERS.
PARAM.name: robustnessIters

PARAM.description: If the median residual at a certain robustness iteration is less than this amount, no more iterations are done.
PARAM.name: accuracy

THROWS.description: if bandwidth does not lie in the interval [0,1].
THROWS.name: OutOfRangeException
THROWS.content: if bandwidth does not lie in the interval [0,1].

PARAM.name: xval

PARAM.description: the values for the interpolation points

THROWS.description: if @code xval} not sorted in strictly increasing order.
THROWS.assertion: assert !Arrays.stream(args[0]).distinct().forEach(d -> { for (int i = 0; i < args[0].length - 1; i++) { if (d <= args[0][i + 1]) return false; } return true; });
THROWS.name: NonMonotonicSequenceException
THROWS.content: if @code xval} not sorted in strictly increasing order.

THROWS.description: if @code xval} and @code yval} have different sizes.

THROWS.content: if @code xval} and @code yval} have different sizes.

THROWS.description: if @code xval} or @code yval} has zero size.
THROWS.name: NoDataException
THROWS.content: if @code xval} or @code yval} has zero size.

THROWS.description: if any of the arguments and values are not finite real numbers.
THROWS.name: NotFiniteNumberException
THROWS.content: if any of the arguments and values are not finite real numbers.

THROWS.description: if the bandwidth is too small to accomodate the size of the input data (i.e. the bandwidth must be larger than 2/n).
THROWS.name: NumberIsTooSmallException
THROWS.content: if the bandwidth is too small to accomodate the size of the input data (i.e. the bandwidth must be larger than 2/n).
